meaning: vt.举例说明,图解,加插图于,阐明vi.举例
examples: Let me illustrate what I mean with an old story.
One example will suffice to illustrate the point.
To illustrate my point , let me tell you a little story.
Beers like Two Hundred fathoms illustrate how far Irish stout has come in the last few years.
The tour focuses on peeling back the layers of history to illustrate what has and has not changed.
